name: claude-sessions
title: Claude Sessions
description: Browse and resume Claude Code sessions from iTerm2 or Terminal.app. Lists all past sessions from ~/.claude/projects with the first user prompt as a sprechender title.
author: gbechtold

commands.name: browse-sessions
commands.title: Browse Claude Sessions
commands.subtitle: Claude Code
commands.description: List and resume Claude Code sessions from ~/.claude/projects.

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal App
preferences.description: Which terminal app to open when resuming a session.

preferences.name: sessionLimit
preferences.title: Session Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of sessions to load (10–500).

preferences.name: jsonlRootPath
preferences.title: JSONL Root Path
preferences.description: Where to look for Claude Code session JSONLs. Default: ~/.claude/projects.
